final_prompt.prompt:
Create a UI design system for web Dashboard, mobile interfaces, cards, buttons, and controls (all in-image text in Chinese).

Style/medium: needs a "经典简约科技风格" aesthetic with "视觉炫酷" and "科技感极强" direction — references in the spirit of Apple Human Interface Guidelines minimalism, Tesla interface design heritage, Dyson product UI precision; exact stylistic execution is yours
Composition: must include multiple UI components — web Dashboard, mobile interface, cards, buttons, controls — arranged as a comprehensive design system showcase
Subject: must include the UI components: web Dashboard, mobile interface, cards, buttons, controls
Scene/backdrop: 
Lighting/mood: needs a high-tech atmosphere with visual depth — exact light source mix is yours
Color palette: needs a rich layered direction — exact hex values and ratios are yours
Materials/textures: needs a sleek tech surface treatment — exact grain / sheen / weight is yours
Text (verbatim): 
Constraints: must include all in-image text in Chinese by default; must preserve the design system scope (Dashboard + mobile + cards + buttons + controls)
Avoid:
